_publications._publicationTitle: CDK4/6-MEK Inhibition in MPNSTs Causes Plasma Cell Infiltration, Sensitization to PD-L1 Blockade, and Tumor Regression.

_contextSnippet: Daily oral therapy with palbociclib plus mirdametinib significantly slowed tumor growth compared to vehicle or either monotherapy
details: Daily oral therapy with palbociclib plus mirdametinib significantly slowed S462 orthotopic xenograft tumor growth compared to vehicle or either monotherapy
